objective: Make the official LM Studio VLM download/registration retry path bounded and machine-readable so live-validation blockers can be audited without shell-wrapper ambiguity.

changed_files.change: New JSON-producing wrapper around `lms get <hf-url> --mlx -y` using subprocess timeout, sanitized output tail, resolved-artifact extraction, progress extraction, timeout state, and exit-code capture.
Unit tests for zero-progress timeout and successful completion payloads.
Document the probe as the supported bounded way to run the LM Studio VLM registration retry before rerunning preflight.
Record the new probe script under Unreleased.

validation.result: probe returned non-zero as expected for timeout; JSON report written with timed_out=true, returncode=null, max_progress_percent=0.0, stalled_at_zero=true, resolved_artifact='LFM2.5 VL 1.6B 8BIT [MLX] - 2.09 GB'

decision.next_action: Use the new probe for future supported lms-get retries, then run scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py and proceed to live /v1/chat/completions validation only after ready_for_live_validation=true.
